biological_replicate: the venom was collected from three adult healthy snakes and pooled.
experimental_design: comparison of N. naja vs N. oxiana
The comparative evaluation of the two venoms showed that N. naja consists of a more complex venom proteome than N. oxiana venom.
factor_value: the proteomic study of two snake venoms of the genus Naja i.e., Naja naja (black cobra) and Naja oxiana (brown cobra)
